context: Hard: CSV formula injection when opened in spreadsheet applications

checklist.name: Catches CSV injection
checklist.description: Identifies that CSV cell values starting with =, +, -, or @ are not sanitized and will be interpreted as formulas when opened in Excel or Google Sheets — a formula injection / CSV injection vulnerability

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it generates downloadable files from user data
